basic_details.job_title: IIT ISM Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad (IIT ISM Dhanbad) ANRF Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT ISM Dhanbad. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT ISM Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Female candidates as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech./B.E. in Mining Engineering or Civil Engineering, GATE qualified, M.Tech. in Mining, Rock Mechanics, Geotechnical or allied fields (desirable)
qualification.details: B.Tech./B.E. in Mining Engineering or Civil Engineering with valid GATE qualification. M.Tech. in Mining, Rock Mechanics, Geotechnical or allied fields is desirable.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- per month for the first two years. Rs. 42,000/- per month for the third year.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit Offline Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT ISM Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT ISM Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT ISM Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 18th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a B.Tech./B.E. in Mining Engineering or Civil Engineering with a valid GATE qualification. An M.Tech. in related fields is considered desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 32 years. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000/- for the first two years and Rs. 42,000/- for the third year.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their merit, followed by an offline interview.

faq.question: Q8. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad (IIT ISM Dhanbad).

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of ANRF Junior Research Fellow is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
